title: T-052 — What-If Simulation screen (P2 gated)
prompt:
# T-052 — What-If Simulation screen (P2 gated)

PRD: `docs/prd/07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md` §8.1 SCR-07-05, §17.1 PLE-008, §9.7.
UX/prototype refs are listed in `pipeline_inputs.scope_files`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Prepare the P2 what-if prototype as a feature-gated implementation task.

## Implementation contract
Use existing solver queue with dry_run semantics, persist scenario params/result_summary, and render locked mode cleanly for P1 tenants.

ACP shape reminder: keep this task as one atomic implementation. Do not add ACP-owned fields. Keep local dependencies in `dependencies`; cross-module contracts in `cross_module_dependencies` are blockers/inputs, not ACP local task IDs.

pipeline_inputs.description: Implement /scheduler/simulate P2-gated scenario builder, result compare table, mini-Gantt diff, saved scenarios list.
pipeline_inputs.details: Matches pext_scenarios. When flag off, render locked P2 placeholder; when on, run dry-run simulations that never commit to scheduler_assignments.
acceptance_criteria: Given planning.what_if_simulation.enabled=false, then /scheduler/simulate shows locked P2 state and no solver action controls.
Given flag is on and Run Simulation is clicked, then solver runs dry_run=true and result stores in scheduler_scenarios without committing assignments.
Given saved scenario rows render, then view/re-run/delete controls match pext_scenarios parity and respect RBAC.

Given the UI task is closed, when CLOSEOUT is recorded, then it includes Playwright trace artifacts plus screenshots/artifacts for prototype parity and error/empty/blocked states per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
test_strategy: RED feature-gate RTL tests and action test that assignments are unchanged.
Run pnpm --filter web test scheduler/ScenarioSimulationScreen scenario-actions.
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not commit scenario output to live schedule.
Do not expose P2 interactive controls when flag off.
pipeline_inputs.priority_normalization_note: Priority normalized to ACP convention bands on 2026-05-03; lower number means earlier execution.
ui_closeout_evidence: Desktop screenshot/artifact of the implemented surface compared 1:1 to prototype `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/scenario-screens.jsx:3-211` (structural, visual, and interaction parity).
Playwright trace artifact for the primary happy path and at least one error/blocked/permission-denied path.
Axe (or equivalent) accessibility result, or a documented blocker with rationale.
List of intentional deviations from the prototype/UX with reason (e.g. P2 gating, RBAC hide).
Reference parity expectations in `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` and translation notes in `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-planning-ext.md`.
